title: Top K Frequent Elements
pattern: Heap â€” Frequency Counting with Min-Heap
coreIdea: Find the k most frequently occurring elements in an array by first counting frequencies with a hashmap, then using a min-heap of size k to keep only the top k frequent elements.
recognitionCues: asks for top k frequent/occurring elements
approach: Build a frequency hashmap of element to count. Push (frequency, element) pairs onto a min-heap, popping the smallest whenever heap size exceeds k. Remaining heap elements are the top k frequent, extracted at the end.
spaceComplexity: O(n) for frequency map, O(k) for heap
